goal: Fix worker-loop body-loading. lib/handoffs.cjs::claimHandoff returns destPath (string), but lib/team/worker-loop.cjs:103 read .body off it expecting an object. Result: every handoff dispatched via gad team got an empty body, prompt fell back to '(body not loaded)' → codex either guessed or hung. Fix: call readHandoff() after claimHandoff() to load body separately. Validated: foreground worker test with the fix prints actual handoff body in prompt file. Discovered while dispatching VCS extraction Phase 1 (h-2026-04-21-VCS-extraction-phase-1) where the empty prompt + codex hooks hang killed the run.
